title: eleocharis sanguinea
intro: Eleocharis sanguinea, also known as red spike-rush, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the cattail family, Typhaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Eleocharis sanguinea is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
